title: Cyrtidiorchis triptera
taxonomy: Cyrtidiorchis triptera is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. This species belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae, a group of terrestrial orchids that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Cyrtidiorchis is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. Cyrtidiorchis triptera is native to New Guinea and surrounding islands. The exact classification of Cyrtidiorchis triptera may vary depending on the specific taxonomic system used.
